title: The CAPA Lifecycle That Closes the Loop
alt: Continuous CAPA cycle from capturing a problem through to effectiveness check and closure

items.label: Capture & describe
items.desc: Record a precise problem statement: what, where, when, detection.

items.label: Triage & risk-assess
items.desc: Scale effort to risk; check for recurrence at intake.

items.label: Investigate root cause
items.desc: Use a structured method and follow the evidence.

items.label: Plan actions
items.desc: Define correction, corrective and preventive actions with owners.

items.label: Implement & verify
items.desc: Execute the changes and confirm they were done as written.

items.label: Check & close
items.desc: Prove effectiveness, then close and feed management review.
